title: Puzzleflower
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''puzzleflower''' was a flowering plant from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nimban/Legends|Nimban]]. The flower was eaten by the [[Nimbanel/Legends|Nimbanese]] people. In order to get to the edible part, the flower's petals had to be unlocked. This forced the Nimbanels to develop advanced puzzle-solving skills early in their history.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-09-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''
